name: bundle-builder-api
description: REST API prototype for ViciSwap Bundle Builder recommendations.

scripts.check: node --check src/recommendation-engine.js && node --check src/news-intelligence.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check test/news-intelligence-test.js && node --check test/smoke-test.js && node --check test/server-fallback-test.js && node --check test/verify-handoff.js
scripts.test: node test/news-intelligence-test.js && node test/smoke-test.js && node test/server-fallback-test.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && node test/verify-handoff.js
